channel.title: NACM Clase, EL Fu, A Ashur, RCL Beale, IA Clase, MB Dolovich, MJ Jardine, M Joseph, G Kansiime, JFE Mann, R Pecoits-Filho, WC Winkelmayer, JJ Carrero | PlatCOVID

item.title: Forgotten Technology in the COVID-19 Pandemic: Filtration Properties of Cloth and Cloth Masks-A Narrative Review.
